{{Hatnote|This page refers to the study of [[memes]] in a phenotypic sense for the study of [[internet memes]]  see [[memeology]]}}Memetics is the study of [[Memes]]. 

It has many subdisciplines such as [[neuromemetics]] and [[population memetics]].

== See Also ==

* [[genetics]]
* [[scenetics]]

[[Category:Memetics]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Memetics]][[Category:Memes]]
[[sn:Memetics]]
[[Category:Pages]]
